title: Tree Feller
description: A lightweight, configurable tree chopping mod for Fabric. Supports customizable activation and drop pulling to the broken stump spot.
body:
## 🌲 TreeFeller

TreeFeller is a lightweight quality-of-life mod that allows you to chop down entire trees in a single action.

Break one log, and all directly connected logs of the same type will be chopped automatically. The system is designed to stay close to vanilla gameplay, keeping wood gathering fast and satisfying without removing the need for tools or progression.

---

## ✨ Features

- Chop connected trees automatically
- Designed to feel natural and survival-friendly
- Consumes tool durability for each log broken
- Only affects directly connected logs (build-safe)
- Keybind support with configurable behavior
- Pulls drops to the broken stump position
- Multiplayer-safe

---

## ⚙️ Compatibility

- Minecraft Java Edition
- Fabric (NeoForge support planned)
- Works in survival worlds
- Supports vanilla tree types
- May support modded logs depending on tags and compatibility

---

## 📦 Installation

- Download the mod `.jar` and place it in your `mods` folder
- Requires Fabric (NeoForge support planned)

---

## 📝 Notes

- Extremely large trees may be limited for performance reasons
- Only directly connected logs are chopped
- Logs placed by players may be affected if connected

---

## 🖼️ Icon License

The TreeFeller icon is included for use with this project only.  
The icon may not be reused, redistributed, or modified outside of this mod without permission.

---
